plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-199 RP06.P01.M02.S09-RP06.P01.M04.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-199 extends DMS Core into descriptor-only type-shape, state-transition, serialization, and service-domain metadata while preserving CP00-198 foundation and keeping object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, and Loop runtime out of scope.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-199 dms core type shape service descriptor pack
